task: Define builder contract and calibration facade boundary
acceptance_criteria: Builder inputs outputs and facade exports align with existing calibration domain contracts
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m ruff check finance-agent-core/src/agents/technical
notes: Added a decision-observability builder result contract and exported the new builder through the calibration domain facade without moving observability ownership into calibration.

task: Implement observation builder from events plus outcomes
acceptance_criteria: Observability truth can be transformed into calibration observations without deep infrastructure imports
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m pytest finance-agent-core/tests -q
notes: Added a builder that converts monitoring truth rows into `TechnicalDirectionCalibrationObservation` records, with drop-reason tracking and direction-family normalization.

task: Wire calibration consumers while retaining offline file path
acceptance_criteria: DB-backed builder becomes the intended mainline source and file-based loading remains available for offline or manual flows
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m pytest finance-agent-core/tests -q
notes: Added runtime support for DB-backed calibration observation loading and exposed the builder through calibration facades, while keeping file-based `load_technical_direction_calibration_observations()` unchanged for offline/manual workflows.

acceptance_criteria: Existing fitting and calibration contracts continue to work with the new source
